sn25.9:1.1: At Sāvatthī. "Bhikkhus, the earth element is impermanent, changing, becoming otherwise. The water element … The heat element … The air element … The space element … The consciousness element is impermanent, changing, becoming otherwise. [n.271] Viññāṇadhātu is missing in Ee, but found in Be and Se. One who … with enlightenment as his destination."
